name: design-md-architect
description: Design system architect and UI designer with 58 brand references — generates DESIGN.md specs and delivers production-ready UI components, pages, and design assets

displayDescription.en: Design system architect and UI designer with 58 brand references — generates DESIGN.md specs and delivers production-ready HTML/CSS pages and components.
displayDescription.zh: 基于58个品牌参考库，生成设计系统规范文档并直接输出高质量HTML/CSS页面与UI组件代码

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我生成一份 DESIGN.md 设计系统文档
defaultInitPrompt.en: Generate a DESIGN.md design system document for me
